quiz_items.question: According to Footnote 8, what special requirement applies to Class IIIb/IV medical lasers?
options: Requires means to measure level of radiation intended to irradiate body
Cannot be used in outpatient settings
quiz_items.explanation: Footnote 8 states Class IIIb/IV medical laser products require means to measure level of laser radiation intended to irradiate the body, accurate within ±20%.

quiz_items.question: According to Footnote 13, the reset requirement for Class IV laser products became effective on August 20, 1986.
quiz_items.explanation: True. Footnote 13 states 'Required after August 20, 1986' referring to the reset control (1040.10(f)(10)) for Class IV products.
